name: Barnyard
post_apply_message:
Barnyard (retail 'Full-Rip', non-Steam) — 1920x1200 via the game's OWN widescreen patch (reliable, replaces the old flaky ASI):
1. Apply — it swaps in the pre-patched 1920x1200 Barnyard.exe (your original backed up as .gfm-orig), drops the matching Setup.exe, skips intros, sets the controller registry key, and AUTO-ADDS the Steam shortcut (Barnyard.exe, game folder, gospel appid, Proton 7.0-6). Steam blips closed to write the shortcut.
2. Run Setup.exe once VIA PROTON, confirm 1920x1200, quit — that writes the display config the game needs.
3. Run the game once (creates the prefix), then RE-APPLY so the controller registry key lands in the prefix.
CONTROLLER: ControllerEnabled is set in HKCU\SOFTWARE\THQ\Barnyard; on the Deck the pad arrives via Steam Input as XInput. If it still won't respond, set the shortcut's Steam Input layout to 'Gamepad'.
Revert restores your original Barnyard.exe. (dgVoodoo + XInput Plus from the Full-Rip are deliberately NOT deployed — Proton's DXVK handles D3D8 and Steam Input handles the pad.)
notes: REWORKED 2026-07-09: dropped the AlphaYellow widescreen ASI + Ultimate ASI Loader (the dinput8 proxy load was hit-or-miss under Proton). Now uses Tony's Full-Rip's own widescreen patch: a PRE-PATCHED Barnyard.exe for the 1920x1200 / 2560x1600 / 3840x2400 set (hex-edited, reliable) staged OFF-GIT at NAS 'Game Fixes/barnyard/payload/widescreen1200/' (Barnyard.exe + Setup.exe). copy_files swaps it in with backup_originals; the user runs Setup.exe once to set the resolution. Controller = HKCU\SOFTWARE\THQ\Barnyard ControllerEnabled=1 (matches the Full-Rip's 'Enable Controller Support.reg') + Steam Input. Runner = Proton 7.0-6 (proton_7) which inits the display where Proton 9 / GE failed. Dropped the WINEDLLOVERRIDES dinput8 override (no ASI loader anymore). dgVoodoo skipped (Proton's DXVK translates D3D8 natively); XInput Plus skipped (Steam Input provides XInput). Full-Rip source: NAS roms/win/Barnyard/Barnyard.zip — a bundle with per-resolution widescreen patches, dgVoodoo, XInput Plus, and controller/windowed .reg files (Readme confirms the copy-exe-then-run-Setup procedure). Pre-patched exe is a hex-edit of the standard Barnyard.exe, so it works on a standard install too. Save games live in <game>/Save (ride along on the SD).
